work_unit: MM-001 route-fix: engine.rs attempt_match 错误传播 + tracing::warn + match_error event
situation: audit-2026-07-01-010 deep audit 发现 moni-rs/crates/moni-engine/src/engine.rs:467 update_quotes 中 `let _ = self.attempt_match(...)` 静默吞掉 Result<(), String> 错误。后果：撮合异常不入日志、客户端收不到 error event、订单卡 SUBMITTED/PARTIALLY_FILLED 无解释。Python 原版有 logging.warning。派生 fix priority #3（route-fix）。
action: 改 line 467 一处：将 `let _ = self.attempt_match(...)` 替换为 `if let Err(e) = ... { tracing::warn!(order_id, symbol, err, "match failed on quote update"); self.notifications.publish(EngineEvent::new("match_error", json!({order_id, symbol, error, trigger}))); }`。cargo check -p moni-engine 通过。opt-worktree.sh commit 到 optimization worktree（route-fix 复用，未触 public-interfaces）。
